info.title: ImpactOS API
info.description: Impact & Scenario Intelligence System for Strategic Gears.

post.description: Register an I-O model (Z, x, sector codes).

Trigger AI-assisted compilation for a set of line items.

Accepts EITHER inline line_items OR document_id (loads from DB).
S0-4: Doc→shock wiring — compile from stored documents.
Amendment 1 (S0-4): Uses latest COMPLETED extraction only.
Amendment 2 (S0-4): 409 if no completed extraction or no line items.
Amendment 4 (MVP-12): Uses workspace library entries via list_for_agent().

get.description: Get compilation suggestion status.

post.description:
Accept or reject suggestions in bulk.

Amendment 3 (MVP-12): Auto-captures to mapping library via repository.
Wrapped in try/except — library failure never blocks decisions.

Compute data quality summary for a run.

Amendment 6: ?force_recompute=true deletes existing and recomputes.
Otherwise returns 409 if summary already exists.

parameters.name: force_recompute

schema.description: Amendment 6: Delete existing summary and recompute
schema.title: Force Recompute

parameters.description: Amendment 6: Delete existing summary and recompute

get.description: Get the quality summary for a specific run.
Get freshness overview for all runs in a workspace.
Get quality overview for all runs in a workspace.

post.description:
Trigger a new depth engine plan.

Creates plan row (PENDING), then runs sync or dispatches to Celery.

get.description: Get depth plan status and artifact summary.

parameters.name: max_disclosure_tier

schema.description: Filter artifacts to this tier and below. TIER0=internal, TIER1=client, TIER2=boardroom.
schema.title: Max Disclosure Tier

parameters.description: Filter artifacts to this tier and below. TIER0=internal, TIER1=client, TIER2=boardroom.

get.description: Get a single depth artifact by step name.
Get the final scenario suite plan (convenience endpoint).

post.description: Upload a document (Section 6.2.5).

Trigger extraction (Section 6.2.5).

Sync mode (dev/test): runs extraction inline, returns final status.
Async mode (CELERY_BROKER_URL set): dispatches to Celery, returns QUEUED.

get.description: Poll job status (Section 6.2.5).
Get extracted line items for a document.

post.description:
Create a new export — generates requested formats with watermarks.

S0-4: NFF claims now fetched from DB by run_id (not empty list).
Governed exports will be properly blocked if claims are unresolved.

get.description: Get export status and metadata.

post.description: Compare two runs and decompose changes into drivers.
Create a new constraint set (or new version of existing set).

get.description: List all constraint sets for a workspace.

schema.title: Response List Constraint Sets V1 Workspaces  Workspace Id  Constraints Get

get.description: Get a constraint set (latest version or specific version).

post.description:
Run feasibility solver on an existing unconstrained run.

Enforces all amendments:
- 501 for RAMP_RATE / TimeWindow constraints
- 422 for model version mismatch
- Satellite coefficients loaded internally from ModelData

get.description: Get all feasibility results for a run.

schema.title: Response Get Feasibility Results V1 Workspaces  Workspace Id  Runs  Run Id  Feasibility Get

post.description: Extract atomic claims from draft narrative text.
NFF gate: validate claims are supported or resolved.
Create a new assumption (draft status).
Approve an assumption — requires sensitivity range.

get.description: Get governance status for a run.
Get blocking reasons for a run.

Version = MAX(workspace) + 1 (Amendment 1).

Accepts EITHER document_id (preferred) OR inline line_items (deprecated).

post.description:
Compute workforce impact for a run.

Amendment 1: Accepts optional feasibility_result_id for feasible delta_x.
Amendment 2: Unit normalization.
Amendment 9: Idempotency — returns existing result if same inputs.

get.description: Get all workforce results for a run.

schema.title: Response Get Workforce Results V1 Workspaces  Workspace Id  Runs  Run Id  Workforce Get

get.description:
Liveness probe with component health checks.

Phase 0 v2: Checks API + database + Redis + object storage.
Returns 200 always (degraded status if components are down).
Return application name, version, and environment.

schema.title: Response Get Version Api Version Get

evidence_snippet_ids.title: Evidence Snippet Ids
evidence_snippet_ids.description: At least one evidence snippet required.

completeness_score.title: Completeness Score
completeness_score.description: Fraction of expected fields that are populated.

BoQLineItem.title: BoQLineItem
BoQLineItem.description:
Normalized spend line item extracted from a BoQ document.

Every line item MUST link to at least one EvidenceSnippet via
evidence_snippet_ids for audit-grade traceability.

src__api__compiler__CompileRequest.title: CompileRequest
src__api__compiler__CompileRequest.description:
Compile request — provide EITHER line_items OR document_id, not both.

S0-4 Amendment 3: workspace_id removed from body (use path parameter).
